# Dotfiles

Each config which needed to be described separately has it's own `README.md`. It's better personally for me to manage such. Configs with separated descriptions:

- [Rofi](https://github.com/weissmall/dotfiles/tree/niri/.config/rofi)
- [Swaylock](https://github.com/weissmall/dotfiles/tree/niri/.config/swaylock)

## Installation
Currently Ansible automated installation is under development and will be ready soon. At this time [this link](https://github.com/weissmall/arch-ansible) will be available.

> Due to using [yadm](https://yadm.io/) for dotfiles management `README.md` and main repo files are located in `.github`
